dataSourceInstructions:
### Clarification
- Use the column Total Excluding Tax when asked about Total Sales
- Revenue = Sales
- Always join on Delivery Date when asked about Time Series Analysis, unless otherwise specified
### Synonyms
- stock_item_name: product name, item name
- unit_price: price, sales price, cost, item cost
userDescription: Wide World Importers (WWI) is a Microsoft sample dataset representing a modern wholesale and distribution company. This Lakehouse includes realistic sales, purchasing, inventory, customer, and warehouse operations data. It provides clean, well structured Delta tables for demos, analytics, and natural language insights with Data Agents.
